questions.question: SNE ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Social Needs Education
options.C: Standard Nursery Education

questions.explanation: SNE ka matlab Special Needs Education hota hai, jo vishesh zarooraton waale bachhon ki shiksha se sambandhit hai.

questions.question: Ek Special Needs Education Assistant (SNEA) ka mukhya kaam kya hota hai?

options.A: Lead teacher ko unke kaam mein sahayata karna
options.B: Sirf bachhon ke saath khelna
options.C: School ki administration dekhna

questions.explanation: SNEA ka main role lead teacher ko special needs waale bachhon ko padhane aur unki dekhbhaal mein sahayata karna hota hai.

questions.question: Inclusive Education (Samaveshi Shiksha) ka kya arth hai?

options.A: Sirf special needs waale bachhon ko ek saath padhana
options.B: Sabhi bachhon ko, chahe unki yogyata kuch bhi ho, ek hi classroom mein padhana
options.C: Bachhon ko unki yogyata ke anusaar alag-alag classes mein rakhna
options.D: Sirf gifted bachhon ke liye alag school

questions.explanation: Inclusive Education ka matlab hai ki har tarah ke bachhon ko ek saath, ek hi classroom environment mein shiksha dena, jisse sabko samaan avsar mile.

questions.question: RPWD Act, 2016 mein kitni disabilities ko shamil kiya gaya hai?
questions.explanation: The Rights of Persons with Disabilities (RPWD) Act, 2016 ne disabilities ki sankhya 7 se badhakar 21 kar di hai.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ke liye kaun sa gun (quality) sabse zyada zaroori hai?

options.B: Computer skills
options.C: Tez daudna

questions.explanation: Special needs waale bachhon ke saath kaam karne ke liye dhairya ya patience sabse mahatvapurna gun hai, kyunki progress dheere ho sakti hai.

questions.question: 'Mainstreaming' aur 'Inclusion' mein kya mukhya antar hai?

options.B: Mainstreaming mein bachhe ko regular class ke liye 'taiyar' hona padta hai, jabki Inclusion mein class bachhe ke liye 'taiyar' hoti hai
options.C: Mainstreaming sirf high school ke liye hai
options.D: Inclusion sirf primary school ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Mainstreaming ka focus bachhe ko regular setup mein fit karne par hota hai. Inclusion ka focus system ko badalne par hota hai taaki sabhi bachhe fit ho sakein.

questions.question: Special education mein 'least restrictive environment' (LRE) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Bachhe ko us setting mein padhana jo uske non-disabled saathiyon ke saath sabse zyada interaction de
options.C: Bachhe ko ek alag special school mein bhejna
options.D: Classroom mein koi niyam na hona

questions.explanation: LRE ka siddhant kehta hai ki special needs waale bachhon ko general education classroom mein unke saathi bachhon ke saath jitna ho sake, utna padhaya jaana chahiye.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ko bachhe ke baare mein jaankari kahan se milti hai?

options.B: Sirf parents se
options.C: Teacher, parents, aur bachhe ki file (IEP) se

questions.explanation: Sahi aur poori jaankari ke liye SNEA ko teacher, mata-pita, aur bachhe ke Individualized Education Plan (IEP) jaise sabhi sroton se jaankari leni chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aap ek bachhe ke saath kaam kar rahe hain aur aapko koi aisi samasya aati hai jiska hal aapko nahi pata, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Samasya ko ignore kar dena chahiye
options.B: Apne senior ya lead teacher se madad maangni chahiye
options.C: Khud se kuch bhi try karna chahiye
options.D: Bachhe ke parents ko call karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Professional tarika yeh hai ki jab aap kisi cheez ko lekar sure na hon, to hamesha apne supervisor, lead teacher, ya specialist se salaah len.

questions.question: Special education mein 'person-first language' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Pehle disability ka naam lena, phir व्यक्ति ka
options.B: Pehle व्यक्ति ka zikr karna, phir uski disability ka (jaise 'autism wala bachha' ke bajaye 'bachha jise autism hai')
options.C: Sirf bachhe ke naam se bulana
options.D: Disability ke liye code words use karna

questions.explanation: Person-first language ek sammanjanak tarika hai jismein hum vyakti ko uski disability se pehchante nahi, balki usse pehle ek insaan ke roop mein dekhte hain.

questions.question: Early intervention (jaldi hastakshep) kyon mahatvapurna hai?

options.A: Isse school ka kharcha kam hota hai
options.B: Isse bachhe ke vikas mein aane waali badhaon ko jaldi pehchan kar aage ki samasyaon ko kam kiya ja sakta hai
options.C: Isse parents ko aaram milta hai

questions.explanation: Bachpan mein jaldi se jaldi developmental delays ya disabilities ko pehchan kar support shuru karne se bachhe ke overall development par bahut positive asar padta hai.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ka din-pratidin ka kaam kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Bachhe ko academic tasks mein madad karna
options.B: Bachhe ko physical activities mein support karna
options.C: Teacher ke instructions ko bachhe ke liye saral banana

questions.explanation: SNEA ke kaam mein padhai, khel-kood, aur teacher ke nirdeshon ko samajhne mein bachhe ki madad karna, yeh sabhi shamil hota hai.

questions.question: National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 special needs education ke baare mein kya kehti hai?

options.B: Inclusive education aur sabke liye samaan avsar par zor dena
options.C: Online education ko anivarya karna

questions.explanation: NEP 2020 samaveshi shiksha (inclusive education) par bahut zor deti hai aur yeh sunishchit karna chahti hai ki har bachhe ko quality education mile.

questions.question: SNEA aur teacher ke beech achha communication kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Isse bachhe ki progress ko behtar tareeke se track kiya ja sakta hai
options.B: Isse classroom mein ek positive mahaul banta hai
options.C: Isse bachhe ke liye strategies consistent rehti hain

questions.explanation: Teacher aur SNEA ke beech regular aur clear communication bachhe ki behtari ke liye har tarah se zaroori hai, jisse sabhi ek team ki tarah kaam kar sakein.

questions.question: Special education ka antim lakshya kya hai?

options.B: Bachhe ko jitna ho sake aatmanirbhar (independent) aur samaaj ka hissa banana
options.C: Bachhe ko hamesha support dena
options.D: Bachhe ko dusre bachhon se alag rakhna

questions.explanation: Special education ka ultimate goal bachhe ko skills sikhana hai taaki woh apni zindagi mein maximum independence hasil kar sake aur samaaj mein yogdaan de sake.

questions.question: Dyslexia kis cheez se judi ek learning disability hai?

options.B: Padhne aur likhne (Reading and writing) se
options.C: Bolne (Speaking) se

questions.explanation: Dyslexia ek specific learning disability hai jismein bachhe ko padhne, shabdon ko pehchanne, aur spelling mein kathinai hoti hai.

questions.question: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) waale bachhe mein aam taur par kaun se lakshan dikhte hain?

options.A: Social communication mein samasya aur repetitive behaviors
options.B: Sirf padhai mein kamzori
options.C: Bahut zyada sharirik takat

questions.explanation: ASD ke mukhya lakshan hain - doosron se social interaction aur communication mein mushkil, aur ek hi kaam ko baar baar dohrana (repetitive behaviors).

questions.question: ADHD ka full form kya hai?

options.B: All Day Hyperactive Disorder
options.C: Attention Development and Hearing Disorder

questions.explanation: ADHD ka poora naam Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder hai, jismein dhyaan kendrit karne mein, aavesh ko niyantrit karne mein aur atyadhik chanchalta mein samasya hoti hai.

questions.question: Intellectual Disability (Baudhik Akshamta) ko kaise pehchana jaata hai?

options.B: IQ score aur adaptive behavior (rozmarra ke kaam karne ki kshamta) dono se
options.C: Sirf school ke grades se

questions.explanation: Intellectual Disability ko diagnose karne ke liye significantly low IQ score ke saath-saath adaptive skills (jaise communication, self-care, social skills) mein bhi kami honi chahiye.

questions.question: Cerebral Palsy (CP) kis prakaar ki samasya hai?

options.B: Ek neurological disorder jo sharir ki gati aur muscle coordination ko prabhavit karta hai
options.C: Ek learning disability

questions.explanation: Cerebral Palsy vikasit ho rahe dimaag ko chot lagne ke karan hota hai, jisse body movement, balance, aur posture mein samasya aati hai.

questions.question: Ek bachha jise Dyscalculia hai, use kis cheez mein sabse zyada pareshani hogi?

options.B: Sports khelne mein
options.C: Numbers aur basic maths samajhne mein

questions.explanation: Dyscalculia ek specific learning disability hai jo ganit (mathematics) se sambandhit hai. Ismein bachhe ko numbers, counting, aur basic calculations mein mushkil hoti hai.

questions.question: Down Syndrome ka kya kaaran hota hai?

options.B: Ek extra chromosome (Chromosome 21) ka hona
options.C: Galat parvarish

questions.explanation: Down Syndrome ek genetic condition hai jo chromosome 21 ki ek extra copy hone ki vajah se hoti hai. Ise Trisomy 21 bhi kehte hain.

questions.question: Sensory Processing Disorder (SPD) kya hai?

options.B: Brain ka senses (touch, sound, sight) se mili jaankari ko theek se process na kar paana
options.C: Memory loss ki samasya

questions.explanation: SPD mein dimaag ko indriyon se milne waale signals ko organize karne mein mushkil hoti hai, jisse vyakti aawaz, roshni ya sparsh ke prati over-sensitive ya under-sensitive ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek non-verbal bachhe ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Woh bachha jo bol nahi sakta
options.B: Woh bachha jo bolkar communicate nahi karta, lekin dusre tarikon se kar sakta hai
options.C: Woh bachha jo sun nahi sakta

questions.explanation: Non-verbal ka matlab hai ki bachha communication ke liye bolne waale shabdon ka istemaal nahi karta. Woh ishare, pictures, ya devices se communicate kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Speech and Language Impairment mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Sahi se bol na paana (Stuttering, articulation problems)
options.B: Bhasha ko samajhne mein pareshani (Receptive language)
options.C: Apne vicharon ko vyakt karne mein pareshani (Expressive language)

questions.explanation: Speech and Language Impairment ek broad term hai jismein bolne ki samasya (speech) aur bhasha ko samajhne aur istemaal karne ki samasya (language) dono shamil hain.

questions.question: Hearing Impairment (Shravan Badhita) waale bachhe ki madad ke liye classroom mein kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Use aage ki seat par bithana
options.B: Bolte samay uske chehre ki taraf dekhna
options.C: Visual aids ka zyada istemaal karna

questions.explanation: Aage baithne se woh behtar sun aur dekh paayega. Chehre ki taraf dekhne se lip-reading mein madad milti hai. Visual aids se concept samajhna aasan hota hai.

questions.question: Visual Impairment (Drishti Badhita) waale bachhe ke liye kaun si sahayak samagri upyogi hai?

options.B: Large print books
options.C: Audio tapes

questions.explanation: Visual impairment ke level ke anusaar, Braille (poorn andhepan ke liye), bade print waali kitabein (low vision ke liye), aur audio samagri, sabhi upyogi ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Oppositional Defiant Disorder (ODD) waale bachhe ka aam vyavhaar kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Bahut zyada gussa, bahas karna, aur authority figures ki baat na manna
options.C: Chup-chaap aur alag-thalag rehna

questions.explanation: ODD ek behavioral disorder hai jiske lakshan hain - gusse wala swabhav, authority (jaise parents, teachers) ke saath bahas karna aur unke nirdeshon ko janbujhkar na manna.

questions.question: Har bachha jise special needs hain, woh ek jaisa hota hai. Kya yeh kathan sahi hai?

options.A: Haan, sabki zarooratein ek jaisi hoti hain
options.B: Nahi, har bachha alag hota hai aur uski zarooratein bhi alag hoti hain
options.C: Sirf ek hi disability waale bachhe ek jaise hote hain

questions.explanation: Yeh ek aam galatfehmi hai. Ek hi diagnosis (jaise Autism) waale do bachhe bhi bahut alag ho sakte hain. Har bachhe ki apni strengths aur challenges hote hain.

questions.question: Dysgraphia kya hai?

options.B: Likhne mein kathinai (Jaise handwriting, spelling, aur vicharon ko likhit roop dena)
options.C: Chehre pehchanne mein kathinai

questions.explanation: Dysgraphia ek learning disability hai jo likhne ki kshamta ko prabhavit karti hai. Ismein handwriting kharab ho sakti hai aur likhit roop mein vichar vyakt karna mushkil ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ko alag-alag disabilities ke baare mein janna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki woh bachhe ke vyavhaar aur zarooraton ko behtar samajh sake
options.B: Taaki woh sahi support strategy istemaal kar sake
options.C: Taaki woh teacher aur parents se aasaani se communicate kar sake

questions.explanation: Disabilities ki jaankari hone se SNEA bachhe ko behtar samajh paata hai aur uski zarooraton ke anusaar sahi madad kar paata hai.

questions.question: Locomotor Disability ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Haddiyon, jodon ya maanspeshiyon se judi samasya jiske kaaran chalne-firne mein pareshani ho
options.C: Sochne mein samasya

questions.explanation: Locomotor disability sharir ke angon ki movement se judi hoti hai, jisse vyakti ko chalne, firne ya kisi cheez ko pakadne mein kathinai hoti hai.

questions.question: Co-morbidity ya co-occurring condition ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek bimari jo theek ho gayi ho
options.B: Ek hi vyakti mein ek se zyada disability ya condition ka hona (jaise ADHD ke saath Dyslexia)
options.C: Ek aisi condition jo sirf bujurgon mein hoti hai

questions.explanation: Co-morbidity ka matlab hai jab ek vyakti mein ek saath do ya do se adhik alag-alag disorders ya conditions maujood hon.

questions.question: Tourette Syndrome ke aam lakshan kya hain?

options.B: Baar-baar anichchhit roop se sharirik harkatein ya aawazein nikalna (jise 'tics' kehte hain)
options.C: Padhne mein kathinai

questions.explanation: Tourette Syndrome ek neurological disorder hai jismein repetitive, involuntary movements aur vocalizations hote hain, jinhe tics kaha jaata hai.

questions.question: Kisi bachhe ko diagnose karne ka kaam kiska hai?

options.B: Teacher ka
options.C: Principal ka
options.D: Qualified professional jaise doctor, psychologist ya specialist ka

questions.explanation: Ek SNEA ya teacher bachhe ke lakshanon ko pehchan kar report kar sakte hain, lekin kisi bhi disability ko diagnose karne ka adhikar sirf trained aur qualified professionals ko hota hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein visual schedule (tasveeron wala time-table) istemaal karne se kisko sabse zyada fayda hota hai?

options.B: Autism ya ADHD waale bachhon ko, jinko routine aur predictability pasand hai
options.C: Sirf un bachhon ko jo padh nahi sakte

questions.explanation: Visual schedule bachhon ko yeh samajhne mein madad karta hai ki ab kya hone waala hai. Yeh anxiety kam karta hai aur transitions ko aasan banata hai, khaaskar ASD waale bachhon ke liye.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha classroom mein bahut hyperactive hai, to use shaant karne ke liye kya karna ek achhi strategy hai?

options.B: Use ek 'movement break' dena (jaise 2 minute ke liye walk karna ya stretch karna)
options.C: Use class se bahar nikal dena

questions.explanation: Hyperactive bachhon ko apni extra energy nikalne ke liye chote-chote breaks ki zaroorat hoti hai. Daantne se situation aur kharab ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Differentiated Instruction ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabhi bachhon ko ek hi tarike se padhana
options.B: Ek hi topic ko alag-alag bachhon ki zarooraton ke anusaar alag-alag tarikon se padhana
options.C: Sirf aasan topics padhana
options.D: Bachhon ko group mein na padhana

questions.explanation: Differentiated Instruction ek teaching approach hai jismein teacher ek hi concept ko padhane ke liye content, process, aur product ko bachhon ke learning styles aur readiness ke hisaab se badalta hai.

questions.question: Ek SNEA bachhe ko one-on-one support kab de sakta hai?

options.A: Jab bachhe ko koi naya concept samajhne mein mushkil ho rahi ho
options.B: Jab teacher poori class ko instruct kar raha ho aur bachhe ko extra help chahiye ho
options.C: Jab bachhe ko kisi task par focus karne mein madad chahiye ho

questions.explanation: SNEA ka role hi teacher ke nirdeshan mein bachhe ko zaroorat ke anusaar individual support dena hai, chahe woh academic ho ya behavioral.

questions.question: Classroom mein 'sensory corner' ya 'calm-down corner' ka kya uddeshya hota hai?

options.A: Bachhon ko saza dene ki jagah
options.B: Ek surakshit jagah jahan bachha overstimulated ya pareshan hone par shaant ho sake
options.C: Sone ki jagah

questions.explanation: Yeh ek aisi jagah hoti hai jahan kam roshni, shaant mahaul aur kuch calming tools (jaise stress ball, soft blanket) hote hain, jisse bachha apne senses ko regulate kar sake.

questions.question: Task analysis kya hai?

options.B: Ek bade kaam ko chote-chote, aasan steps mein todna
options.C: Bachhe ke kaam ko check karna

questions.explanation: Task analysis ek technique hai jismein kisi bhi complex skill (jaise joote ke laces bandhna) ko manageable steps mein break down kiya jaata hai, taaki bachha use aasani se seekh sake.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha aapse kehta hai ki doosre bachhe use pareshan kar rahe hain, to aapka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Use kehna ki woh khud handle kare
options.B: Uski baat ko shaanti se sunna aur use surakshit mehsoos karana
options.C: Turant doosre bachhon ko daantna
options.D: Is baat ko ignore kar dena

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle bachhe ki baat par vishwas karna aur use sunna zaroori hai. Iske baad, is mamle ko lead teacher ya school ke niyam anusaar aage badhana chahiye.

questions.question: Peer tutoring (saathiyon dwara shikshan) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Special needs waale bachhe ko apne saathi se seekhne ka mauka milta hai
options.B: Jo bachha sikha raha hai, uska concept aur clear hota hai
options.C: Dono bachhon mein social skills develop hoti hain

questions.explanation: Peer tutoring dono bachhon ke liye faydemand hai. Yeh academic aur social, dono tarah ki skills ko badhava deta hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein physical environment ko special needs waale bachhe ke liye kaise anukoolit (adapt) kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Furniture ko is tarah lagana ki wheelchair aasaani se aa-ja sake
options.B: Deewaron par bahut zyada distracting cheezein na lagana
options.C: Bachhe ki zaroorat ke anusaar lighting ka prabandh karna

questions.explanation: Classroom ka physical setup bachhe ki learning par bahut asar daalta hai. Accessibility, kam distractions, aur aaramdayak mahaul banana zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Accommodation' aur 'Modification' mein kya antar hai?

options.B: Accommodation mein 'kaise' seekhna hai badla jaata hai, jabki Modification mein 'kya' seekhna hai badla jaata hai
options.C: Accommodation sirf exam ke liye hota hai
options.D: Modification sirf homework ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Accommodation (jaise extra time dena) learning ke tareeke ko badalta hai, par content wahi rehta hai. Modification (jaise kam sawaal dena) learning ke content ya expectation ko hi badal deta hai.

questions.question: Ek bachhe ko instructions dete samay SNEA ko kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Instructions lambe aur detailed hone chahiye
options.B: Instructions saaf, chote aur ek samay mein ek hi hona chahiye
options.C: Tez aawaz mein instructions dene chahiye

questions.explanation: Special needs waale bachhon ke liye, instructions ko saral aur seedha rakhna sabse prabhavi hota hai, taaki woh aasaani se samajh sakein.

questions.question: Positive reinforcement (sakaratmak prabalan) ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Bachhe ke achhe kaam par uski taarif karna ya use sticker dena
options.C: Bachhe se uski pasand ki cheez le lena

questions.explanation: Positive reinforcement ka matlab hai achhe vyavhaar ke baad kuch achha dena (jaise taarif, star), jisse us vyavhaar ke dobara hone ki sambhavna badh jaati hai.

questions.question: Classroom mein transitions (ek activity se doosri par jaana) ko aasan banane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Achanak se activity badal deni chahiye
options.B: Transition se pehle bachhon ko warning deni chahiye (jaise '5 minute mein hum drawing band karenge')
options.C: Transition ke samay bachhon par chillana chahiye
options.D: Koi transition nahi hona chahiye, ek hi activity poore din chalni chahiye

questions.explanation: Pre-warnings ya countdowns bachhon ko mentally prepare hone mein madad karte hain, jisse transition smooth hota hai aur behavior problems kam hoti hain.

questions.question: Assistive Technology (AT) ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Yeh bachhon ko khelne mein madad karti hai
options.B: Yeh aise tools aur devices hain jo disability waale logon ko kaam karne mein madad karte hain (jaise text-to-speech software)
options.C: Yeh sirf teachers ke liye hai
options.D: Yeh bahut mehengi hoti hai aur iska koi fayda nahi

questions.explanation: Assistive Technology koi bhi item ya software ho sakta hai jo ek disabled vyakti ki functional capabilities ko badhata hai, jaise communication device ya special keyboard.

questions.question: Ek SNEA small group activities ko kaise facilitate kar sakta hai?

options.A: Group ke paas baithkar zaroorat padne par madad karna
options.B: Yeh sunishchit karna ki sabhi bachhe participate kar rahe hain
options.C: Bachhon ke beech aapsi jhagde suljhana

questions.explanation: Small group mein SNEA ka role ek facilitator ka hota hai jo group ko on-task rakhta hai, participation encourage karta hai aur zaroorat padne par support deta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha kisi kaam ko karne se mana kar de (task refusal), to SNEA ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Use saza dena
options.C: Pehle uske vyavhaar ke peeche ka kaaran samajhne ki koshish karna (kya kaam bahut mushkil hai? kya woh thaka hua hai?)
options.D: Use class se bahar bhej dena

questions.explanation: Har vyavhaar ke peeche ek kaaran hota hai. Saza dene se behtar hai ki pehle yeh samjha jaaye ki bachha kaam kyon nahi karna chah raha, phir uss hisaab se strategy banayi jaaye.

questions.question: Classroom mein routine aur predictability kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Isse bachhon mein suraksha aur sthirta ki bhavna aati hai
options.B: Isse anxiety kam hoti hai
options.C: Isse bachhon ko pata hota hai ki unse kya expect kiya jaa raha hai

questions.explanation: Ek consistent routine khaaskar special needs waale bachhon ke liye bahut zaroori hai. Yeh unke liye duniya ko kam confusing aur zyada manageable banata hai.

questions.question: Prompting kya hai aur iska istemaal kab karna chahiye?

options.B: Yeh ek ishara ya madad hai jo bachhe ko sahi response dene ke liye di jaati hai, aur ise dheere-dheere kam karna chahiye
options.C: Yeh sirf physical help ho sakti hai
options.D: Prompting ka istemaal nahi karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Prompt ek hint hai (verbal, gestural, physical). Iska maqsad bachhe ko successful banana hai, lekin goal hamesha prompt ko fade out karna hota hai taaki bachha independent bane.

questions.question: Ek SNEA bachhe ke social skills ko kaise behtar bana sakta hai?

options.A: Role-playing ke through practice karwa kar
options.B: Group activities mein participation ke liye encourage karke
options.C: Achhe social behavior ko praise karke

questions.explanation: Social skills ko alag-alag tarikon se sikhaya aur practice karwaya ja sakta hai. SNEA in sabhi tarikon mein ek mahatvapurna bhoomika nibha sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar aap teacher se kisi strategy ko lekar sehmat nahi hain, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Parents se teacher ki shikayat karna
options.B: Classroom mein teacher se bahas karna
options.C: Private mein, sammanpurvak teacher se is baare mein baat karna aur apna perspective batana
options.D: Apni marzi se strategy badal dena

questions.explanation: Professionalism yeh kehta hai ki matbhed ko akele mein aur samman ke saath suljhaya jaaye. Bachhon ke saamne team mein anban dikhana galat hai.

questions.question: IEP ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Internal Examination Paper
options.C: Inclusive Education Program

questions.explanation: IEP ka poora naam Individualized Education Plan hai. Yeh ek legal document hai jo special needs waale bachhe ke liye banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: IEP kyon banaya jaata hai?

options.A: Bachhe ki specific educational zarooraton ko poora karne ke liye
options.B: Bachhe ke liye saal bhar ke goals set karne ke liye
options.C: Yeh batane ke liye ki bachhe ko kya services milengi

questions.explanation: IEP ek blueprint ki tarah hai jo bachhe ki unique needs, uske goals, aur un goals ko achieve karne ke liye di jaane waali services aur support ka vivaran deta hai.

questions.question: IEP meeting mein kaun-kaun shamil hota hai?

options.B: Parents, teacher, special educator, school administrator, aur kabhi-kabhi bachha bhi
options.C: Sirf principal

questions.explanation: IEP ek collaborative process hai jismein bachhe se jude sabhi important log shamil hote hain taaki ek comprehensive plan banaya ja sake.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ka IEP process mein kya role hota hai?

options.B: IEP mein likhe gaye goals ko classroom mein implement karne mein teacher ki madad karna
options.C: IEP ko approve karna
options.D: SNEA ka koi role nahi hota

questions.explanation: SNEA IEP banate nahi hain, lekin woh iske implementation mein ek bahut zaroori kadi hain. Woh teacher ke nirdeshan mein IEP goals par bachhe ke saath kaam karte hain.

questions.question: IEP mein 'SMART' goals ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Small, Meaningful, Active, Real, Tested
options.C: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound

questions.explanation: SMART ek acronym hai jo effective goals set karne ke liye use hota hai. Goals Specific (vishesh), Measurable (maapne yogya), Achievable (prapt karne yogya), Relevant (prasangik), aur Time-bound (samay-baddh) hone chahiye.

questions.question: SNEA bachhe ki progress par data kaise collect kar sakta hai?

options.B: Checklists ka istemaal karke
options.C: Bachhe ke kaam ka sample (work sample) collect karke

questions.explanation: Data collection zaroori hai yeh dekhne ke liye ki bachha progress kar raha hai ya nahi. SNEA in sabhi tarikon se objective data collect karne mein madad kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Anecdotal record kya hota hai?

options.B: Kisi ghatna ya vyavhaar ka chota, objective, likhit vivaran
options.C: Bachhe ki report card

questions.explanation: Anecdotal record mein SNEA jo dekhta hai, use factually likhta hai (jaise 'Rahul ne 10:15 am par 3 baar pencil neeche phenki'). Ismein apni opinion nahi likhi jaati.

questions.question: Bachhe ki progress ko document karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh IEP goals ki effectiveness ko track karne mein madad karta hai
options.B: Yeh parents aur teachers ke saath communication ke liye aadhar pradan karta hai
options.C: Yeh future planning ke liye zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Documentation se hi pata chalta hai ki kaun si strategies kaam kar rahi hain aur kahan badlav ki zaroorat hai. Yeh accountability aur planning ke liye aavashyak hai.

questions.question: Agar aap dekhte hain ki ek bachha apne IEP goal ko bilkul bhi achieve nahi kar paa raha hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Goal ko khud se badal dena
options.B: Bachhe par zyada dabav dalna
options.C: Apne observations ko lead teacher ke saath share karna

questions.explanation: SNEA ka kaam hai observe karna aur report karna. Agar koi strategy ya goal kaam nahi kar raha hai, to iski jaankari teacher ko deni chahiye taaki IEP team milkar is par vichar kar sake.

questions.question: IEP ek ________ document hai.

options.B: Gatil (dynamic) jise regularly review aur update kiya jaata hai
options.C: Gopniya (secret)

questions.explanation: IEP ek static document nahi hai. Ise kam se kam saal mein ek baar review kiya jaata hai aur bachhe ki zarooraton aur progress ke anusaar badla jaata hai.

questions.question: Documentation karte samay SNEA ko kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Documentation objective (tathyaparak) hona chahiye, subjective (vyaktigat) nahi
options.B: Date, time, aur setting ka zikr hona chahiye
options.C: Bhasha saaf aur professional honi chahiye

questions.explanation: Achha documentation hamesha factual, specific, aur professional hota hai. Ismein personal feelings ya opinions ki jagah nahi hoti.

questions.question: Portfolio assessment kya hai?

options.B: Samay ke saath bachhe ke kaam ka ek systematic collection (jaise drawings, writing samples, photos)
options.C: Ek oral test

questions.explanation: Portfolio bachhe ki progress aur growth ko dikhane ka ek behtareen tarika hai. Yeh sirf final result nahi, balki poori learning process ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Bachhe ke records ko confidential rakhna kiska dayitva hai?

options.B: Sirf Teacher ka
options.C: School se jude har staff member ka, jismein SNEA bhi shamil hai

questions.explanation: Bachhe ki jaankari, khaaskar uske IEP aur doosre records, bahut confidential hote hain. Inhe sirf un logon ke saath share kiya jaana chahiye jo bachhe ki education mein सीधे taur par shamil hain.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ko bachhe ke IEP ki copy padhne ka adhikar hai ya nahi?

options.A: Nahi, yeh sirf teacher ke liye hai
options.B: Haan, taaki woh bachhe ke goals aur zarooraton ko samajh sake aur uske anusaar kaam kar sake
options.C: Sirf principal ki permission se

questions.explanation: Jo bhi staff member bachhe ke saath kaam karta hai, use IEP ke relevant hisson ki jaankari honi chahiye taaki woh a consistent support pradan kar sake.

questions.question: Present Level of Performance (PLOP) IEP ka ek hissa hai. Iska kya matlab hai?

options.A: Bachhe ki pichli saal ki performance
options.B: Bachhe ki vartaman academic aur functional performance ka vivaran
options.C: Bachhe ke future goals

questions.explanation: PLOP (ya PLP/PLAAFP) IEP ka starting point hota hai. Yeh batata hai ki bachha abhi kahan hai, uski strengths kya hain aur uski needs kya hain.

questions.question: AAC ka full form kya hai?

options.B: All About Communication
options.C: Academic and Activity Center

questions.explanation: AAC un sabhi tarikon ko kehte hain jo bolne ke alawa communication mein madad karte hain, jaise picture cards, sign language, ya communication devices.

questions.question: Ek non-verbal bachhe ke saath communicate karne ke liye SNEA kya istemaal kar sakta hai?

options.B: Sign language
options.C: Tablet par communication app

questions.explanation: Non-verbal bachhon ke liye communication ke kai tarike ho sakte hain. SNEA ko bachhe ke liye jo system chuna gaya hai, use istemaal karna aana chahiye.

questions.question: Challenging behavior (chunautipurn vyavhaar) kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Khud ko ya doosron ko nuksaan pahunchana
options.B: Cheezein phenkna ya todna
options.C: Zor-zor se chillana

questions.explanation: Challenging behavior woh koi bhi vyavhaar hai jo bachhe ki learning ya doosron ki safety mein badha daalta hai.

questions.question: Har behavior ke peeche ek ________ hota hai.

options.B: Function ya kaaran (communication)
options.C: Inaam

questions.explanation: Behavior analysis ka mool siddhant hai ki har vyavhaar ek tarah ka communication hai. Bachha apne vyavhaar se kuch paane (attention, item), ya kisi cheez se bachne (task, sensory input) ki koshish kar raha hota hai.

questions.question: ABC model of behavior analysis mein 'A', 'B', aur 'C' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Antecedent, Behavior, Consequence
options.C: Action, Behavior, Care

questions.explanation: Yeh behavior ko samajhne ka ek framework hai: A-Antecedent (vyavhaar se theek pehle kya hua), B-Behavior (vyavhaar kya tha), C-Consequence (vyavhaar ke theek baad kya hua).

questions.question: Agar ek bachha gusse mein hai, to SNEA ki sabse pehli prathmikta kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Sabki suraksha sunishchit karna (bachhe ki, apni, aur doosron ki)
options.C: Use time-out mein bhej dena

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi crisis situation mein, pehla kadam hamesha safety hota hai. Jab sab surakshit hon, tab behavior ko manage karne ki strategy lagayi ja sakti hai.

questions.question: De-escalation technique ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Bachhe ke gusse ko aur badhana
options.B: Aisi techniques jisse bachhe ke gusse ya tension ko shaant kiya ja sake
options.C: Bachhe ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: De-escalation ka matlab hai situation ko aage badhne se rokna. Ismein shaant aawaz mein baat karna, bachhe ko space dena, aur uski feelings ko validate karna shamil ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ko bachhe ke saath ek positive relationship banana kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Isse bachha SNEA par vishwas karta hai aur uski baat sunta hai
options.B: Isse bachha school aane mein khushi mehsoos karta hai
options.C: Isse behavior problems kam hoti hain

questions.explanation: Ek strong, positive rapport learning aur behavior management ki neev hai. Jab bachha aapko pasand karta hai aur aap par trust karta hai, to woh aapse seekhne ke liye zyada taiyar hota hai.

questions.question: Token economy kya hai?

options.B: Ek system jismein bachhe achhe behavior ke liye tokens (jaise stars ya points) earn karte hain, jinhe baad mein kisi inaam ke liye exchange kiya ja sakta hai
options.C: Ek game

questions.explanation: Token economy positive reinforcement ka ek structured tarika hai. Yeh bachhon ko desired behaviors ke liye motivate karta hai.

questions.question: Active listening (sachet shravan) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Poora dhyaan dekar sunna, samne waale ko samajhna, aur response dena
options.C: Baat kaat kar apni baat kehna
options.D: Sunne ke dauran phone istemaal karna

questions.explanation: Active listening communication ka ek important hissa hai. Ismein sirf sunna nahi, balki samne waale ki baat ko sahi mayne mein samajhna shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha doosre bachhe ko maarta hai, to SNEA ka immediate response kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Dono bachhon ko alag karna aur shaant karna
options.B: Jisne maara use bhi maarna
options.C: Hasna

questions.explanation: Pehli prathmikta hamesha safety hai. Dono bachhon ko alag karke yeh sunishchit karein ki koi ghayal na ho. Uske baad situation ko handle karein.

questions.question: Behavior Intervention Plan (BIP) kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek plan jo challenging behavior ko kam karne aur use positive behavior se replace karne ke liye banaya jaata hai
options.C: Ek medical plan

questions.explanation: BIP behavior ke function ko samajhne ke baad banaya jaata hai. Ismein proactive strategies (behavior hone se rokne ke liye) aur reactive strategies (jab behavior ho, tab kya karna hai) shamil hoti hain.

questions.question: Receptive language aur Expressive language mein kya farak hai?

options.A: Receptive matlab sunna, Expressive matlab dekhna
options.B: Receptive matlab doosron ki bhasha ko samajhna, Expressive matlab apne aap ko vyakt karna
options.C: Dono ek hi hain
options.D: Receptive matlab likhna, Expressive matlab padhna

questions.explanation: Receptive language input hai (jo hum samajhte hain). Expressive language output hai (jo hum bolte, likhte ya isharon se batate hain).

questions.question: Modeling (anukaran) behavior sikhane ka ek achha tarika kyon hai?

options.A: Bachhe dekh kar aasaani se seekhte hain
options.B: Ismein SNEA khud sahi behavior karke dikhata hai
options.C: Yeh social skills aur communication sikhane ke liye prabhavi hai

questions.explanation: Modeling, ya 'demonstrating', ek powerful teaching tool hai. Bachhe wahi karte hain jo woh doosron ko karte hue dekhte hain.

questions.question: Ek sensory meltdown aur ek tantrum mein kya mukhya antar ho sakta hai?

options.B: Tantrum aksar kuch paane ke liye hota hai aur attention milne par ruk sakta hai, jabki meltdown sensory overload ke kaaran hota hai aur bachhe ke control mein nahi hota
options.C: Meltdown sirf ladkiyon mein hota hai
options.D: Tantrum sirf chote bachhon mein hota hai

questions.explanation: Yeh antar samajhna zaroori hai. Tantrum goal-oriented hota hai, jabki meltdown ek reaction hai jab brain bahut zyada sensory information handle nahi kar paata.

questions.question: Social story kya hai?

options.B: Ek aisi kahani jo bachhe ko kisi social situation (jaise doctor ke paas jaana) ko samajhne aur uske liye taiyar karne mein madad karti hai
options.C: Ek jhoothi kahani

questions.explanation: Social stories bachhe ke perspective se likhi jaati hain aur use batati hain ki kisi situation mein kya expect karna hai aur usse kaise deal karna hai. Yeh anxiety kam karne mein madad karti hain.

questions.question: Proactive strategies ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Behavior hone ke baad action lena
options.B: Aisi strategies jo challenging behavior ko hone se pehle hi rokne ke liye istemaal ki jaati hain
options.C: Bachhe ko hamesha 'pro' ki tarah treat karna
options.D: Sirf professional dwara istemaal ki jaane waali strategies

questions.explanation: Proactive strategies (jaise visual schedule, clear expectations, sensory breaks) behavior management ka sabse important hissa hain. Inka maqsad problem ko shuru hi na hone dena hai.

questions.question: Extinction (in behavior terms) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Us reinforcement ko hata dena jo behavior ko banaye rakhe hue hai (jaise attention-seeking behavior ko ignore karna)
options.C: Bachhe ko class se hata dena

questions.explanation: Extinction ka matlab hai ki jis cheez se behavior ko 'fuel' mil raha tha, use rok dena. Agar bachha attention ke liye chilla raha hai, to use attention na dena (jabki woh safe ho) ek extinction strategy hai.

questions.question: Communication mein body language ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Koi mahatva nahi hai, sirf shabd zaroori hain
options.B: Yeh bahut mahatvapurna hai, kyunki isse hamari bhavnayein aur attitude pata chalta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf actors ke liye zaroori hai
options.D: Yeh communication ko confusing banati hai

questions.explanation: Hamara posture, facial expressions, aur gestures hamare shabdon se zyada communicate karte hain. SNEA ko apni body language ke prati sakaratmak aur supportive rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Bachhe ko choices dena (jaise 'Aap pehle red ya blue crayon se color karoge?') kyon ek achhi strategy hai?

options.A: Isse bachhe ko control aur independence ki feeling aati hai
options.B: Isse power struggles kam hote hain
options.C: Yeh bachhe ko decision-making sikhata hai

questions.explanation: Limited choices dena ek simple par bahut effective strategy hai. Isse bachha aadesh maanne ke bajaye, process mein shamil mehsoos karta hai.

questions.question: Confidentiality (gopniyata) ka kya arth hai?

options.A: Bachhe ki personal aur academic jaankari ko private rakhna aur sirf zaroori logon se share karna
options.B: Bachhe ke baare mein sabko batana
options.C: Bachhe ke baare mein social media par post karna

questions.explanation: Confidentiality ek ethical aur legal zimmedari hai. SNEA ko bachhe ki jaankari (disability, family issues, grades) ko professional setting ke bahar discuss nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ke liye professional dress code kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh school aur aapke kaam ke prati samman darshata hai
options.B: Yeh bachhon ke liye ek achha example set karta hai
options.C: Yeh safety aur comfort ke liye zaroori ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Saaf-suthre aur appropriate kapde pehenna professionalism ka hissa hai. Yeh aapki credibility banata hai aur ek positive work environment mein yogdaan deta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko classroom mein koi unsafe condition (jaise geela farsh ya toota furniture) dikhti hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Uske theek hone ka intezaar karna
options.C: Turant apne supervisor ya teacher ko report karna aur bachhon ko usse door rakhna

questions.explanation: Safety hamesha pehli prathmikta hai. Kisi bhi khatre ko turant report karna SNEA ki zimmedari hai taaki durghatna ko roka ja sake.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ko parents ke saath kaise communicate karna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf teacher ki maujoodgi mein, jab tak ki nirdesh na ho
options.C: Bachhe ki progress ke baare mein positive aur factual information dekar (teacher ke guidance mein)

questions.explanation: Parents ke saath communication teacher lead karta hai, lekin SNEA ko hamesha respectful aur professional rehna chahiye. Bachhe ki confidential jaankari ya negative opinions share karne se bachna chahiye.

questions.question: POCSO Act, 2012 kisse sambandhit hai?

options.B: Bachhon ko yaun shoshan (sexual abuse) se bachane se
options.C: Disability rights se

questions.explanation: The Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act, 2012 ek bahut important kanoon hai. School mein kaam karne waale har vyakti ko iski basic jaankari honi chahiye aur bachhon ki suraksha ke prati satark rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Aap bachhe ke saath akele hain aur woh aapko batata hai ki ghar par uske saath bura bartav hota hai. Aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Bachhe ko kehna ki woh jhooth bol raha hai
options.B: Is baat ko secret rakhne ka wada karna
options.C: Shaanti se uski baat sunni chahiye aur turant school ki child protection policy ke anusaar apne supervisor ya designated person ko report karna chahiye
options.D: Khud jaakar uske parents se ladna

questions.explanation: Ek SNEA ek 'mandated reporter' ho sakta hai. Iska matlab hai ki agar unhe child abuse ka sandeh hota hai, to use report karna unki kanooni zimmedari hai. Bachhe se secret rakhne ka wada kabhi na karein.

questions.question: Professional boundaries banaye rakhne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Bachhon ya unke parivar ke saath personal ya financial rishte na banana
options.B: Social media par bachhon ya unke parents se na judna
options.C: Apni personal problems bachhon ya parents se share na karna

questions.explanation: Professional boundaries SNEA aur bachhe/parivar ke beech ek surakshit aur apekshit rishta banaye rakhti hain. Yeh SNEA ko unprofessional situations se bachata hai.

questions.question: Ek SNEA ke roop mein, aapko apni skills ko lagatar update karte rehna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Special education ka field lagatar badal raha hai
options.B: Nayi research aur techniques aati rehti hain
options.C: Isse aap bachhon ko behtar support de paate hain

questions.explanation: Lifelong learning is field mein bahut zaroori hai. Workshops, training, aur padhai ke through apni knowledge ko fresh rakhna ek achhe professional ki nishani hai.

questions.question: Teamwork ek inclusive classroom mein kyon mahatvapurna hai?

options.A: Isse teacher, SNEA, aur specialists milkar bachhe ke liye behtar plan bana sakte hain
options.B: Isse workload share hota hai
options.C: Isse ek positive aur supportive school culture banta hai

questions.explanation: Bachhe ki safalta ek team effort hai. Jab sabhi professionals ek saath milkar kaam karte hain, to bachhe ko sabse zyada fayda hota hai.

questions.question: Aap ek SNEA hain. Aapke saamne ek parent doosre special needs waale bachhe ke baare mein personal sawaal poochta hai. Aapko kya jawab dena chahiye?

options.A: Usko sab kuch bata dena chahiye
options.B: Use daant dena chahiye
options.C: Politely kehna chahiye, 'Main doosre bachhon ke baare mein jaankari share nahi kar sakta/sakti, yeh hamari confidentiality policy ke khilaaf hai.'
options.D: Jawab dene se bachne ke liye wahan se chale jaana chahiye

questions.explanation: Yeh confidentiality banaye rakhne ka ek professional tarika hai. Aapko polite rehna hai lekin firm bhi, aur school ki policies ka palan karna hai.
